mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (category_id, dining_point_id, name, price, status, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{categoryId}, #{diningPointId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{status}, #{description}, #{image}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: select s.*, c.name categoryName, dp.name diningPointName from setmeal s left join category c on s.category_id = c.id left join dining_point dp on s.dining_point_id = dp.id where s.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update setmeal
category_id = #{categoryId},
dining_point_id = #{diningPointId},
name = #{name},
price = #{price},
status = #{status},
description = #{description},
image = #{image},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser}
where id = #{id}

update setmeal
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
dining_point_id = #{diningPointId},
price = #{price},
status = #{status},
description = #{description},
image = #{image},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser}
where id = #{id}
